META.TITLE: Kkphoenix - Fullstack Developer
META.DESCRIPTION: Portfolio of Kauã Alves Santos, a fullstack web developer specializing in Angular, Node.js, and 3D web experiences.

ARTICLES.TITLE: Articles & Publications
ARTICLES.SUBTITLE: My academic research and technical papers.
ARTICLES.BIG_AGENT_TITLE: The BIG Agent: The Utilization of Embedded Multi-Agent Systems in Unmanned Aerial Vehicles for Autonomous Operations
ARTICLES.BIG_AGENT_DESC: Inspired by the high crime rates in Brazil and the use of drones in strategic sectors, this work presents an integration of multi-agent systems (MAS) embedded within unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) for autonomous and distributed route operations.

PROJECTS_PAGE.TITLE: SYSTEM_ARCHITECTURE
PROJECTS_PAGE.SUBTITLE: // DEEP DIVES INTO ENGINEERED ECOSYSTEMS
PROJECTS_PAGE.P1_CONTEXT: A highly interactive portfolio aiming to merge standard web practices with cutting-edge 3D graphics and physics, creating a memorable experience without sacrificing accessibility or performance.
PROJECTS_PAGE.P1_ARCH: Built as an Angular 19 SPA. It integrates Three.js for WebGL rendering (including post-processing with EffectComposer) and Matter.js for 2D physics. Heavy use of RxJS for state management (like global Dark Mode and Animation limits) and memory cleanup to prevent GPU leaks during route transitions.
PROJECTS_PAGE.P2_CONTEXT: A multi-agent system inspired by George Orwell's 1984. The goal was to simulate an environment where agents possess embedded artificial intelligence capable of complex navigation, decision-making, and communication without a central orchestrator.
PROJECTS_PAGE.P2_ARCH: Developed with a heavily decoupled architecture. The cognitive backend was built in Python/Java to handle BDI (Belief-Desire-Intention) agent logic, while the physical simulation layer runs on Unity/Three.js. They communicate asynchronously, respecting the strict sensor-actuator loop constraints.
PROJECTS_PAGE.P3_CONTEXT: An indie game currently in active development. You play as Geppetto's ragdoll, surviving a barrage of projectiles, attending the Magic Academy, and navigating between the 3D real world and the ragdoll's dreams. It features a rich Multiclass system and NPCs controlled by generative Artificial Intelligence.
PROJECTS_PAGE.P3_ARCH: 100% Custom Engine built from scratch in pure TypeScript. To support thousands of simultaneous elements at 60 FPS, it utilizes an extreme Zero-Garbage Collection (Zero-GC) architecture and offloads spatial collision mathematics (SAT) to parallel Web Workers.

HISTORY.PHOTO_DESC_1: I am a full-stack developer with a deep passion for coding and system architecture.
HISTORY.PHOTO_DESC_2: I love creating 3D content and crafting beautiful details that make customers happy through engaging interactions!
HISTORY.ASTRONOMY_DESC: Passion for Astronomy and Journey to Software Development: During my school years, I was deeply passionate about astronomy. I was captivated by the beauty of nebulas, the scientific discoveries, and the relentless pursuit of understanding the universe. However, my journey took an unexpected turn when I discovered coding as a hobby and began learning programming independently.
HISTORY.COVID_DESC: With the onset of the COVID-19 pandemic, my country implemented strict lockdowns, which disrupted my access to proper education in physics and other disciplines. This period of isolation gave me time to reflect on my future. Leveraging my self-taught skills, I delved deeper into software development and began envisioning a career in software architecture. I committed myself to rigorous study, day and night, to pave my path toward higher education.
HISTORY.PASSION_DESC: Discovering My True Passion: Through this journey, I found my true calling. Coding combines pure logic with intellectual creativity — two elements I deeply value. It offers a perfect blend of problem-solving, innovative thinking, and the opportunity to deliver impactful solutions to clients. Moreover, I developed a passion for business-driven technology, where creativity meets practicality to achieve meaningful outcomes.
HISTORY.CIEP_DESC: In high school, I learned a lot of things and developed a deep passion for entrepreneurship and business. I dived deeply into JavaScript, created numerous projects, and learned various programming languages and concepts while studying for ENEM, CCAA, and school.
HISTORY.GREETING_PROF: I would like to express my heartfelt gratitude and dedicate a special note to Professor Ricardo, Professor Caroline Brito, Professor Canedo, Professor Cicília, Professor Marcelo, Director Maristela, and all the teachers who contributed to my journey so far. To each of you, I wish nothing but the best. A big hug to all of you.
HISTORY.CEFET_DESC: In college, I am currently pursuing a degree in Information Systems at one of the best federal institutions in Brazil. Why Information Systems? I believe I can deliver more results by understanding a company's business logic and developing practical solutions, rather than focusing purely on hardware and deep theoretical mathematics like in Computer Science. I strongly prefer a practical, hands-on approach, although I still deeply love logic and math.
HISTORY.TCC_DESC: For my final thesis (TCC), I am working on a project that will facilitate the development of embedded AI systems by creating a 3D simulated environment for agents equipped with artificial intelligence.

PROFESSIONAL_HISTORY.SUBTITLE: // CAREER LOGS
PROFESSIONAL_HISTORY.TITLE: Professional History
PROFESSIONAL_HISTORY.PROLOGUE_DESC: I'm looking for the perfect team to write the next chapter.
PROFESSIONAL_HISTORY.HIRE_HINT: Contact me to make this page a reality.
PROFESSIONAL_HISTORY.JOB_MOCK_DESC: I am ready to architect and develop scalable digital solutions for your business, bridging the gap between immersive UI and solid software engineering.
PROFESSIONAL_HISTORY.JOB_MOCK_ACH_3: Optimize performance and eliminate technical debt

HEALTH.TITLE: System Health
HEALTH.SUBTITLE: Real-time tracking of Quality Assurance metrics and WebGL performance
HEALTH.CHAOS_DESC: Traditional coverage lies. I use Stryker Mutator to inject artificial bugs (mutants) into the source code during CI to ensure the tests actually detect failures, proving the resilience of the business rules.
HEALTH.HARDWARE_DESC: WebGL and Physics engines (Three.js/Matter.js) bypass the standard DOM. I use Playwright to emulate real mouse hardware events and Raycasters, ensuring the 3D pipeline works outside local environments.
HEALTH.MEMORY_DESC: Single Page Applications degrade if GPU buffers aren't cleared. Custom Karma/Jasmine pipelines track performance.memory to catch VRAM Memory Leaks on component ngOnDestroy hooks automatically.
HEALTH.HEXAGONAL_DESC: Clean Architecture is easily broken by bad imports. I utilize Dependency-Cruiser and ESLint to strictly forbid UI elements from leaking into Services, blocking circular injections at build time.
HEALTH.SECURITY_DESC: The CI/CD pipeline executes automated security audits testing the Angular DomSanitizer against Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) payloads and checking the backend Hetzner server (formerly AWS) for sensitive infrastructure headers leakage.

HERO.DESC: Full Stack Developer focused on transforming complex systemic problems into scalable, high-performance solutions. From infrastructure orchestration (formerly AWS, now Hetzner) to reactive 3D graphics rendering in the browser.

VALUE.TITLE: Engineering Beyond Code
VALUE.DESC_1: I don't just write scripts; I design architectures. My foundation is built upon Clean Architecture, Design Patterns, and DDD.
VALUE.DESC_2: I build robust backends in Java (Spring) and Node.js with a strictly decoupled design, ensuring high cohesion, testability, and maintainability for any business rule.

CARD_1.TITLE: Complex Front-End
CARD_1.DESC: Mastery of robust SPAs with Angular. State management with RxJS and 3D integration using Three.js and Matter.js for high-performance interfaces and memory control.

CARD_2.TITLE: Artificial Intelligence
CARD_2.DESC: Researcher at the CHON Group. Hands-on experience designing Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) and BDI logic for autonomous drones.

CARD_3.TITLE: LLM Integration
CARD_3.DESC: Development of Java APIs that translate natural language in real-time to control robotic systems using local LLMs (Ollama).

CARD_4.TITLE: End-to-End
CARD_4.DESC: Systemic view of the lifecycle. Implementation of pipelines (CI/CD), data persistence (PostgreSQL), and infrastructure deployment on Hetzner (formerly AWS) with Docker.

GAME.TITLE: Zero-GC Game Engine
GAME.DESC_1: To demonstrate my ability to solve complex, low-level engineering problems, I built a high-performance Roguelite RPG from scratch using pure TypeScript. No Unity, no Unreal.
GAME.DESC_2: It features a custom Zero-Garbage Collection architecture, multi-threaded collision detection via Web Workers, a Lexical Spell Parser, and a dynamic NPC ecosystem powered by local LLMs (Ollama).

TELEMETRY.TITLE: Observability & Telemetry
TELEMETRY.DESC_1: High-performance 3D applications require strict resource management. I implement real-time monitoring to track WebGL FPS, GPU memory allocations, and network latency.
TELEMETRY.DESC_2: Explore the live health dashboard to see how this architecture behaves under the hood, ensuring zero memory leaks and smooth frame rates.

FREELANCE.TITLE: Freelance & Consulting
FREELANCE.DESC_1: Turning bold ideas into high-performance digital products. I am available for freelance projects, offering end-to-end development from immersive UI design to robust backend architecture.
FREELANCE.DESC_2: Whether you need a modern Single Page Application, a custom 3D web experience, or a scalable system built from scratch, I bring startup agility combined with enterprise-grade quality.

HERO.TITLE: CODE. CAST. SURVIVE.
HERO.TAGLINE: A Bullet-Hell Roguelite RPG where your keyboard forges reality.

LORE.LABEL: // LORE_
LORE.TITLE:
A world of chaos.
A soul made of cloth.
LORE.BODY: You are not the hero of the prophecy. You are a living abomination sculpted by Geppetto, a portal between the dream world and reality. Awake and unbound, you enter the forgotten corridors of the Magic Academy, the palaces of the castle of light, and many other unique places through dreams. In an ecosystem where spells are forged with your very soul, where every class is unique, you will need to master alchemy, negotiate with insane creatures, and survive a true barrage of projectiles (Bullet-Hell).

FEATURE_1.LABEL: // CLASS SYSTEM
FEATURE_1.TITLE: Forge your Destiny
FEATURE_1.DESC: Do not limit yourself to a single path. Our expansive Multiclass system allows you to steal, absorb, and combine skills from different bloodlines lost throughout the vast dream world. Be a brutal battlemage, a necromancer, a pyromaniac fire madman, or a never-before-seen anomaly. The skill tree is your blank slate.

FEATURE_2.LABEL: // PROCEDURAL MAGIC
FEATURE_2.TITLE: Syntax is Your Weapon
FEATURE_2.DESC: Forget automated attack buttons. Each class is unique! Compile chaotic spells and abilities dynamically while dodging bullets. Magic demands focus, rhythm, and the perfect syntax. Combat demands skill and wisdom. Shooting requires sanity and a lot of aim.

FEATURE_3.LABEL: // COMBAT SYSTEM
FEATURE_3.TITLE: Systemic Alchemy
FEATURE_3.DESC: It's not just subtracting HP. It's thermodynamics. Fire damage evaporates Water. Wet enemies (WetStatus) conduct Electricity and take amplified damage from Dark magic. Holy damage purges the undead. Every entity inherits and overrides a complex ecosystem of On-Hit vulnerabilities.

FEATURE_4.LABEL: // ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE
FEATURE_4.TITLE: The world Breathes
FEATURE_4.DESC: The academy corridors house beings like the iconic Director Molor. Here, static dialogue trees are dead. Our NPCs have beliefs, desires, and intentions processed dynamically by a Local Generative AI (Ollama). Chat with them freely, and watch as the AI manipulates the physical game world generating interactive scripts. Ask, say, interact, command, and obey simulated brains.

FEATURE_5.LABEL: // PURE ENGINE
FEATURE_5.TITLE: Engine Built From Scratch
FEATURE_5.DESC: We don't use Unity or Unreal. This experience was forged 100% in code. We built our own TypeScript Engine based on Zero-Garbage Collection (so you never feel a stutter) and delegated collision box calculations to Web Workers in parallel. A software engineering monstrosity designed to handle a locked 60 FPS.

FEATURE_6.LABEL: // HEXAGONAL ARCHITECTURE
FEATURE_6.TITLE: The Visuals are Just an Adapter
FEATURE_6.DESC_1: The biggest trap in software development is coupling the visual interface to the business rules. To prove my mastery of Systems Design and DDD, the Core of this RPG was built in strict Hexagonal Architecture (Ports & Adapters).
FEATURE_6.DESC_2: Collision physics, inventory algorithms, and AI logic exist in a purely TypeScript mathematical vacuum. The WebGL graphics engine you see on the screen? It's literally an output Adapter. If I want to run this game in a command-line terminal or migrate the UI to React tomorrow, the system's brain remains completely intocado.

FORGE.TITLE: THE CODE IS OPEN.
FORGE.DESC:
This game is a constant technical evolution. We take engineering seriously: Vitest test suites simulate extreme Headless stress on every commit, and cryptographic signatures block any physical flaws before they reach you.

The entire architecture, the Mage Parser, and the AI's BDI simulations have open doors.

PROJECT_PERSONAL.HERO_DESC: More than a static page. A living Full-Stack ecosystem, designed to mirror my 'Second Brain' in real-time through Continuous Integration (CI).
PROJECT_PERSONAL.ARCH_DESC_1: Content updates don't happen via rigid panels. My study notes are forged in Obsidian and versioned on GitHub. A Java Spring Boot core in Hexagonal Architecture running on Hetzner instances (formerly AWS EC2) captures changes, parses Markdown syntax, and delivers a topological graph tree via REST. Publication is organic and data-driven.
PROJECT_PERSONAL.ARCH_DESC_2: The interface dissolves the barrier between UI and simulation. We use Three.js to render Solar Systems with native Raycasting, and inject Matter.js to generate a physical lamp subject to gravity in the DOM.
PROJECT_PERSONAL.ARCH_DESC_3: To protect the GPU, rendering loops are surgically managed by IntersectionObservers and heavy components are born via Lazy Loading through ViewContainerRef, offloading memory (Zero Garbage Collection Thrashing) when invisible.
PROJECT_PERSONAL.METRICS_DESC: Beautiful architectures are fragile without observability. The Frontend is shielded by continuous Karma/Jasmine suites running deep assertions on the DOM and Memory.

PROJECT_BIG_AGENT.SYSTEM_ONLINE: SYSTEM ONLINE: THE BIG AGENT V1.0
PROJECT_BIG_AGENT.TAGLINE: Utilization of Embedded Multi-Agent Systems in UAVs for Autonomous Operations.
PROJECT_BIG_AGENT.META_DESC: Case study: Utilization of Embedded Multi-Agent Systems in UAVs for Autonomous Operations.
PROJECT_BIG_AGENT.SECTION_1_DESC: High crime rates in Brazil demand constant surveillance. However, traditional centralized systems fail due to data overload, low scalability, and exorbitant maintenance costs.
PROJECT_BIG_AGENT.SECTION_2_DESC: The solution proposes a distributed system where drones are not just tools, but autonomous agents capable of perceiving the environment and acting collaboratively.
PROJECT_BIG_AGENT.AGENT_DRONE_DESC: Controls the hardware, motors, and GPS directly via the ARGO architecture.
PROJECT_BIG_AGENT.AGENT_SECRETARY_DESC: Acts as the decision master, defining strategic routes and communicating via ContextNet.
PROJECT_BIG_AGENT.ALGORITHM_DESC: We ensure stable flight through a continuous feedback loop processing roll, pitch, and yaw rates in real-time.
PROJECT_BIG_AGENT.FSM_NOTE: The system automatically switches to HOVERING between actions to compensate for communication latency between agents.
PROJECT_BIG_AGENT.DEEP_DIVE_TITLE: Logical Structure and Scalability of The BIG Agent
PROJECT_BIG_AGENT.DEEP_DIVE_P1: The BIG Agent proposes an architecture focused on decomposing the control of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs). The system fragments the problem into two fundamental Multi-Agent Systems (MAS): one responsible for the physical interface and direct actuation of the flight hardware, and a central node that processes route planning and tactical orchestration. The validation, executed in the Webots simulator using a DJI Mavic 2 Pro model, proves the viability of mapping logical commands to physical security operations.
PROJECT_BIG_AGENT.DEEP_DIVE_P2: The main pillar of the project is the strict decoupling of layers. Physical perception and motor control are isolated from external network communication, which operates over the ContextNet middleware. By removing the low-level hardware syntax from the responsibilities of the BDI tactical layer, the system achieves the modularity necessary to ensure that updates or occasional failures do not corrupt the control architecture.
PROJECT_BIG_AGENT.DEEP_DIVE_P3: The modeling resolves the structural incompatibility between the discrete reasoning of the agents and the continuous physics of the environment. To handle the latency inherent in sending data, aerodynamic stability is managed by an internal Proportional-Derivative (PD) algorithm that forces the UAV to return to a stationary flight state (hovering) between the execution of each movement packet. This mechanics prioritizes the precision of the premise over fluidity, ensuring predictability.
PROJECT_BIG_AGENT.DEEP_DIVE_P4: Finally, the expansion capacity is intrinsic to the network topology. The communication architecture uses illocutions based on unique UUIDs, defining a rigorous standard for identifying and exchanging messages. This taxonomy builds the foundation necessary for the solution to move from unitary control and support scaling to swarms of UAVs, connecting the solid logic of MAS to practical execution at Edge AI frontiers.
PROJECT_BIG_AGENT.VALIDATION_NOTE: Validated in Webots simulation with realistic physics (ODE).
